title: ICAI CA Foundation & Intermediate January 2026 Exam Results Declared Today!
content:
# ICAI CA Foundation & Intermediate January 2026 Exam Results Declared Today!

Hello everyone! Ek important update hai for all CA Foundation and Intermediate students. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne January 2026 session ke exam results declare kar diye hain today, March 8, 2026.

*   **What's New:** The results for the CA Foundation and Intermediate examinations held in January 2026 are officially out.
*   **How to Check:** Candidates can access their scorecards by visiting the official ICAI results website. You will need your Roll Number and Registration Number to log in.
*   **Key Details:** Along with individual marks, ICAI is also expected to release the All India Rank (AIR) list and pass percentages.

Aap sabhi students ko bahut saari शुभकामनाएं! Those who have cleared can now proceed with their next steps in the CA journey. For those who couldn't make it this time, remember, consistent preparation is key.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Check your results on the official ICAI portal here](https://icai.nic.in)

*Published on: 8 March 2026*
